recap.Biggest Turning Point: The game's sharpest probability swing came at **Q4, 0:31.7**, when home win probability moved from **64.0%** to **33.1%** (**-30.9 percentage points**). Key play:** Hardaway Jr. 3PT Jump Shot (20 PTS) (Jokic 14 AST)
recap.Player Impact: Reaves (LAL)** led the player-impact table with **157.2 total win-probability impact points** across **46 tracked events**.
recap.Comeback Reality: The most interesting comeback window came at **Q4, 4:12**. **Home** trailed by **5 points** with an estimated comeback chance of **13.6%**, which ClutchCast labeled **Difficult**.
recap.Hidden Momentum: The strongest hidden-momentum reading came at **Q1, 8:15**, with a score of **100.0** and a label of **Strong home momentum**. Momentum play:** Smart S.FOUL (P1.T1) (J.Goble)
